title: Institutions like ECI must function independently: Supreme Court Justice BV Nagarathna
description: Supreme Court Justice BV Nagarathna on Saturday said that institutions such as the Election Commission of India (ECI) must function independently if constitutional governance is to remain intact.She was delivering the 1st Dr. Rajendra Prasad Memorial Lecture at Chanakya National Law University, Patna, on the theme Constitutionalism beyond Rights: Why Structure Matters. Justice Nagarathna said that the ECI, Comptroller and Auditor General (CAG) and the Finance Commission share a common design log
